summary: Markets exhibit cautious optimism amid geopolitical tensions and macro signals, with forex pairs and commodities trading in defined ranges. Crypto shows slow grind higher for BTC, while gold and silver face resistance amid interest rate pressures. Equities like Nasdaq maintain upside momentum with support on pullbacks.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Critical level highlighted as potential trap or bull run setup requiring caution in live trading.

signals.reason: Long Brent Crude Futures if daily close above $112.50, though extremely unlikely without war resumption.[1]
